title: EQ - Custom EQ, all possible values
scenario: Custom EQ slider values can be set and saved successfully across all combinations in Device Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported EQ device connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Move each frequency slider (e.g., 32Hz, 64Hz, 125Hz, 250Hz, 500Hz, 1kHz, 2kHz, 4kHz, 8kHz, 16kHz) to various positions across the full range (minimum, middle, maximum).
5. Tap the Save or Apply button to save the custom EQ configuration.
6. Exit the Equalizer screen and re-enter it to verify the saved settings persist.
expected: All combinations of slider values can be set across the full range, and the custom EQ configuration is saved successfully and persists after navigating away and back.
